def positive_network_boundary_without_timeout():
    rule_id = "network_boundary_without_timeout"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Request, sync, or job-style Python functions that call HTTP boundaries with no obvious timeout or retry policy."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
